The '''Itani Run''' was a [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] that bypassed the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]].

This Itani Run was blazed by [[Freia Kallea/Legends|Freia Kallea]] in [[3703 BBY|3703]] and [[3702 BBY]]. It was the first line which crossed the Itani Nebula. The route was first integrated into the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] but became an independent route after a new segment was discovered in the nebula.

[[Darknon Station]], which was located in the [[Itani system/Legends|Itani system]] was located along this route.
